description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a classic double-cutaway design, featuring a glossy black finish on the contoured body and a white pickguard. The neck is made of a lighter wood, likely maple, with a rosewood or similar fingerboard, and is fitted with dot inlays for fret markers. The headstock is angled and displays six inline tuning pegs, with a visible logo on the front. The guitar is equipped with three single-coil pickups, a five-way selector switch, and three control knobs for volume and tone adjustment. The bridge is a standard tremolo type, and the back of the body has a rectangular plate covering the tremolo springs. This instrument is typical of those used in urban music scenes, suitable for street performances, garage bands, or music venues.
description: A glossy black, double-cutaway electric guitar with a white pickguard, three single-coil pickups, and a maple neck with six inline tuners. The design is classic and well-suited for urban music environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black body, white pickguard, three single-coil pickups, control knobs, and the headstock with six inline tuners and a visible logo.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of the guitar, the thickness of the body, and the neck's straight alignment.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the black back, the rectangular tremolo spring cover plate, and the back of the headstock with tuning pegs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the body thickness and the neck's profile, with less detail visible compared to the front.
attribute_headstock_design: Classic Fender-style headstock with six inline tuning pegs and a visible logo on the front
